alien_primitive.recommendation: consume immutable trace-frame payloads during finalization instead of cloning empty params/sub_jaxprs and last-output IDs
alien_primitive.fallback: retain generic cloned sub_jaxpr behavior for non-empty control-flow payloads so fingerprint caches are reset as before

lever: Move TraceFrame internals into ClosedJaxpr construction so scalar chain equations transfer params/sub_jaxprs and output-id lists without clones.

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: Trace equations are iterated in original Vec order, inputs/outputs are traversed in original SmallVec order, and invars/constvars/outvars are derived from the same tracer-id order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No tie-breaking logic is present in trace finalization.
isomorphism.floating_point: N/A; this changes trace IR construction only, not numeric evaluation or scalar operation order.
isomorphism.rng: N/A; no random state is read or written.
isomorphism.errors: Dense VarId lookup, output-shadowing, unresolved-outvar, and const-value error branches are unchanged.
